untranslatable_reason: Signal requires regime detection (bull/bear market classification) and yearly high/low reference levels which are not available in the allowed indicators. Also requires single-line candlestick pattern identification (specific body_pct threshold) and market regime-dependent logic that cannot be expressed as simple linear conditions.
translation_notes: Attempted to approximate using Donchian Channel breakouts (proxy for support/resistance breakouts) and price_pos_20 for yearly range positioning. Entry_long uses lower breakout with position in lower third; entry_short uses upper breakout with position in middle range. However, the original signal's core logic—differentiating performance by market regime and breakout direction with specific yearly range zones—cannot be fully captured without regime classification indicators and explicit yearly high/low levels.
